label: Cyclone ITG Linear
command:
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT && for f in *; do case "$f" in *.out.nc|*.restart.nc|*.big.nc|*.bin|rhs_terms_shape.txt) ;; *) ln -s "$(pwd)/$f" "$tmpdir/$f" ;; esac; done && cd "$tmpdir" && python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re
p = Path('itg_salpha_adiabatic_electrons.in')
text = p.read_text()
text = re.sub(r'(?m)^\s*t_max\s*=.*$', ' t_max = 10.0', text)
p.write_text(text)
PY

label: W7-X Linear

from pathlib import Path
import re
p = Path('itg_w7x_adiabatic_electrons_t2.in')
text = p.read_text()
text = re.sub(r'(?m)^\s*geo_option\s*=.*$', ' geo_option = "nc"', text)
text = re.sub(r'(?m)^\s*vmec_file\s*=.*\n', '', text)
if re.search(r'(?m)^\s*geo_file\s*=.*$', text):

text = re.sub(r'(?m)^\s*t_max\s*=.*$', ' t_max = 2.0', text)
p.write_text(text)
PY
